issues.description: Broad except that silently swallows exceptions without logging or return
issues.fix: Add logger.exception() or return a meaningful error response.

issues.description: json.loads/load without error handling — crashes on malformed input
issues.fix: Wrap in try/except json.JSONDecodeError to handle corrupt JSON gracefully.
